instance_candidates.representative_description: Front-facing, single-seat dark brown leather couch (recliner style) with glossy, creased and slightly worn upholstery, thick padded back and arm cushions, visible horizontal stitching and panel seams; lower footrest seam visible; right side of the couch is edge-cropped in the image; estimated distance from camera ~1.2 m.

Close-up of a lower dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and raised molding; glossy varnish with visible scuffs and small chips at the edges, right side of the door is cropped by the image; appears to be a lower cabinet near the floor, approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

Dark stained wooden cabinet door with a vertical recessed central panel and molded frame, smooth slightly glossy finish showing wood grain and minor surface wear; mostly visible but edges are slightly cropped in the image, estimated ~1.0 m from the camera.

Close-up, edge-cropped view of a dark brown varnished wooden cabinet door front with a rectangular inset panel and simple raised molding; top trim or drawer face is partially visible above, surface has slight gloss and minor scuffs along the upper edge, approximate distance ~0.6 m from camera.

Partial view of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and narrow frame, smooth finish and vertical orientation; right edge of the door is cropped and an adjacent darker rail is visible, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

Tall dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and simple frame, smooth semi-gloss finish with subtle vertical wood grain and no visible hardware; lower edge of the cabinet is cropped in the image and the object appears approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

Close-up of a dark mahogany-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and simple molded frame, glossy finish with slight surface wear; vertically oriented and slightly edge-cropped in the image, no hardware visible — estimated distance about 0.6 m from camera.

Tall dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and vertical wood grain; glossy finish shows a central light reflection and minor surface wear; mostly visible but slightly edge-cropped on the right — approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.

Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark-stained wooden side table showing a curved/turned front leg and lower stretcher shelf with a glossy finish; table top is mostly out of frame and the piece sits adjacent to black leather seating — estimated distance ~0.6 m from camera.

Tall, narrow dark-brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and molded frame, semi-matte finish with minor scuffs near the bottom; the right edge is cropped and the door appears within about 0.8 m of the camera.

Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and visible vertical wood grain; matte finish with minor surface wear and small scuffs, no visible handle; mostly centered in the crop but slightly edge-cropped at the top-right, occupying most of the frame which suggests the camera was about 0.6 m away.

Partial view of a dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular central panel and simple raised molding; vertical orientation with a satin-to-slightly-gloss finish, left edge partially obscured by a bright object and the crop cuts the cabinet edges, no visible hardware; occupies most of the crop and appears fairly close to the camera (approximately 1.0 m).

Partial edge-cropped dark reddish-brown wooden dining chair showing a carved front leg, scalloped apron and patterned upholstered back at the right edge; glossy finish with shadowed lower area — appears about 0.8 m from the camera.

Close-up of a dark brown wooden chair back with multiple vertical slats and a carved/curved top rail, glossy finish and minor edge wear; the right portion of the chair is visible and the object is edge-cropped (partial) in the frame, approximately 0.7 meters from the camera.

Partial edge crop of a dark brown wooden dining chair back showing multiple narrow vertical carved slats and a gently curved top rail; visible wood grain and a slight glossy varnish indicate finished hardwood and the visible portion appears to be about 0.8 m from the camera.
Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark reddish-brown varnished wooden chair back showing multiple curved vertical slats and a rounded top rail; appears photographed from roughly 0.6 meters away.

Partial, edge-cropped rectangular beige and cream striped fabric pillow with woven texture and faint taupe/light-brown bands; appears soft and clean, cut off by the crop edges — approximate distance ~0.6 m from camera.

Centered rectangular pillow with horizontal light-gray and off-white stripes, cotton-like fabric with slight wrinkles and visible seam, mostly visible and partly overlapped by bedding; appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m).

Beige fabric shade table lamp emitting warm light with visible vertical stitched seams and a dark turned wood (or bronze) stepped base; lamp is mostly visible in the crop though the lower base is slightly cut off, image appears slightly soft/low-resolution, estimated ~0.8 m from camera.

Partial/edge crop of a dark brown wooden dresser (approx. 1.2 m from camera) showing multiple paneled drawer fronts with small metal knobs and bar handles, slightly glossy finish and visible molding around drawer edges; top and left side are cut off by the image border.

Partial edge-cropped close-up of a chrome/metallic faucet showing the upper rounded cylindrical spout and reflective surface; the crop is slightly blurred and low-resolution, showing only part of the fixture roughly 0.4 m from the camera.
